basic_details.job_title: RARC Agartala Yoga Therapist Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Regional Ayurveda Research Centre Agartala (RARC Agartala) Recruitment 2026: Regional Ayurveda Research Centre Agartala is conducting a Walk-in Interview for 1 Yoga Therapist posts. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for eligible candidates to attend the interview directly without any prior online application.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy, Diploma in Yoga, Level-II (Therapy Level) Certificate of YCB
qualification.details: Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy with minimum 55% marks from recognized University and two years experience in Yoga Therapy OR Any Graduate with Diploma in Yoga (1 year) with 55% marks and 5 years practical experience; Level-II (Therapy Level) Certificate of YCB; Demonstration skills in Yogic practices.

faq.question: Q1. What is the post name for RARC Agartala Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The post name for the RARC Agartala Recruitment 2026 is Yoga Therapist.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Yoga Therapist post.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is Walk-in.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Yoga Therapist position?
faq.answer: The salary offered for the Yoga Therapist position is Rs. 38,000 per month.

faq.question: Q5. What are the essential qualifications required for the Yoga Therapist post?
faq.answer: Essential qualifications include a Degree in Yoga or Yoga & Naturopathy, or a Diploma in Yoga, along with a Level-II (Therapy Level) Certificate of YCB.

faq.question: Q6. What is the walk-in interview date?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview is scheduled for 23rd June 2026.

faq.question: Q7. Where is the Regional Ayurveda Research Centre located?
faq.answer: The Regional Ayurveda Research Centre is located in Agartala, Tripura, with the pincode 799002.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for this recruitment for any category.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for the Yoga Therapist role?
faq.answer: The selection process includes a Written/Skill Test followed by an Interview.

faq.question: Q10. What documents should candidates bring for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates should bring all original documents, one set of self-attested photocopies, ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates if applicable.
